_comment: Daily Wisdom source for dashboard/index.html. Loaded like mission.json (fetch + inline QUOTES_FALLBACK). Stable slug ids (favorites reference ids). Attribution flags '(trans.)' / '(paraphrased)' / '(from interviews, paraphrased)' are load-bearing — never strip them. All gradients palette-warm. Legacy theme names mapped in JS: career->action, stoicism->equanimity, general->grounding.

quotes.text: You have the right to work, but never to the fruit of work.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita 2.47

quotes.text: Perform your duty equipoised, abandoning all attachment to success or failure. Such equanimity is called yoga.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita 2.48

quotes.text: Yoga is skill in action.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita 2.50

quotes.text: Lift yourself by your own self; do not let yourself sink. For you alone are your own friend, and you alone your own enemy.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita 6.5

quotes.text: For one who has conquered the mind, the mind is the best of friends; but for one who has failed to do so, the mind remains the greatest enemy.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita 6.6

quotes.text: In this path no effort is ever wasted and no gain is ever reversed; even a little practice of this discipline protects one from great fear.
quotes.author: Bhagavad Gita 2.40

quotes.text: You have power over your mind — not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius, Meditations

quotes.text: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius, Meditations

quotes.text: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius, Meditations

quotes.text: It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
quotes.author: Seneca, Letters from a Stoic

quotes.text: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
quotes.author: attributed to Seneca

quotes.text: The greatest obstacle to living is expectancy, which hangs upon tomorrow and loses today. Enjoy the present without an anxious dependence on the future.
quotes.author: Seneca, Letters from a Stoic

quotes.text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu, Tao Te Ching

quotes.text: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Be water, my friend.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee

quotes.text: Play long-term games with long-term people.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: The wound is the place where the light enters you.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: Work is love made visible.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran, The Prophet

quotes.text: Let there be spaces in your togetherness, and let the winds of the heavens dance between you. Love one another, but make not a bond of love.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran, The Prophet

quotes.text: You are what your deep, driving desire is. As your desire is, so is your will. As your will is, so is your deed. As your deed is, so is your destiny.
quotes.author: Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 4.4.5 (trans.)

quotes.text: Lead me from the unreal to the real, from darkness to light, from death to immortality.
quotes.author: Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 1.3.28 (trans.)

quotes.text: This Self is not attained by the weak, nor by the careless, nor by aimless effort; but the wise who strive with steady, right effort enter into it.
quotes.author: Mundaka Upanishad 3.2.4 (trans.)

quotes.text: Arise, awake, and stop not till the goal is reached.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.text: You cannot believe in God until you believe in yourself.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.text: Take up one idea. Make that one idea your life — think of it, dream of it, live on that idea. This is the way to success.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.text: All the powers in the universe are already ours. It is we who have put our hands before our eyes and cry that it is dark.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.text: Every idea that is helpful and great must first be laughed at, then opposed, and only then accepted.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.text: Let what comes come. Let what goes go. Find out what remains.
quotes.author: Ramana Maharshi

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.
quotes.author: Viktor Frankl, Man's Search for Meaning

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Every problem is a gift — without problems we would not grow.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.text: Dreams are not what you see in your sleep; dreams are the things that do not let you sleep.
quotes.author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam

quotes.text: You have to dream before your dreams can come true.
quotes.author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam
